the good thing (subject of مَسَّهُ - touched him)
of the good (thing/matter) (possessed by دُعَآءِ - supplication)
of the good thing/benefit (object of إِلَى)
the good (being acted upon by عَلَى)
the good deeds (that you should race towards)
the good things (that they race towards)

baseForms.m: to thread or string something together

derivedForms.m: the thread (subject being described by الْأَبْيَضُ)

baseForms.m: to strut, to show off, to act arrogantly

derivedForms.m: arrogant one (as object of لا يُحِبُّ - does not love)
an arrogant one (described in this ayah as someone Allah does not love)
arrogant, self-admiring (describing someone Allah does not love)
and the horses (as part of the list of desires)
the horses (object of مِن in مِن رِّبَاطِ)
